description_long: This object is a modern wristwatch displayed upright on a rectangular, slightly sloped stand. The watch features a round, black face with no visible markers or hands, giving it a minimalist and sleek appearance. The case and strap are both a dark, uniform color, likely made from plastic or rubber, and the strap is a simple, solid band with no visible stitching or texture. The stand is translucent and geometric, providing stable support and elevating the watch for clear visibility. There are no visible brand logos or decorative elements on the watch face or strap. The overall design is contemporary and understated, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A minimalist, modern wristwatch with a round black face and a solid dark strap, displayed on a translucent geometric stand. The design is sleek and unadorned, with no visible markers or logos.
description_view_0: Front view shows the round, black, featureless watch face and the full width of the strap on the stand.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the watch case and the curvature of the strap, as well as the button on the case.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the strap and the attachment to the stand, with the watch face edge barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the strap's curve and the case profile, mirroring the other side but without the visible button.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is completely black and featureless, with no visible markers, numerals, indices, subdials, or decorative elements, resulting in a minimalist and modern style.
attribute_strap_type: Solid band strap, likely made of rubber or plastic, with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible stitching.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog-style face with no visible hands, markers, or complications; the display is blank and minimalist.
